description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-text-input` (T1-05). 6/6 libraries ship this — highest priority form control.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, all input types (text/email/password/tel/url/search/number), ElementInternals form association typed correctly
2. Accessibility — label association (not just visual), `aria-describedby` for help/error, `aria-invalid` on error, `aria-required`, prefix/suffix slots accessible, autofill compatibility, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all input types, form association (submit, reset, required validation), error/help text display, prefix/suffix slots, disabled/readonly, character count if present
4. Storybook — all types, all states (default/error/disabled/readonly), prefix/suffix variants
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, focus ring, error state styling, CSS parts (input, label, prefix, suffix, helper)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/AUDIT.md` severity (P0/P1/P2), file:line refs. DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-text-input — T1-05 antagonistic quality review
